title: [CI:DOCS] Minor: Remove unhelpful comment
body:
Likely a copy-paste error, it doesn't apply here.

comments.body: Ephemeral COPR build failed. @containers/packit-build please check.
Keeping this a draft as it will likely conflict with 23086
LGTM. Is there any way (other than cli-pulling the PR) to get rid of the Cirrus noise?

> get rid of the Cirrus noise?

Yes.  In the "files" tab, for the `.cirrus.yml` file, click the "...".  Then on the RHS, un-check "show annotations".
